value.rationale: This offering is a model-selection feature within the Antigravity (Google) agentic coding product, allowing users to choose from multiple frontier reasoning models (e.g., Google's Gemini models) to power the agent's core reasoning. It is a sub-feature of google-antigravity-2-0, not a standalone model product. It maps to flagship-model as a partial capability (it surfaces model choice/selection rather than being a model itself), and is a feature of the Antigravity platform.
